channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 18 novas CVEs
• 6 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-31842 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Tinyproxy through 1.11.3 is vulnerable to HTTP request parsing desynchronization due to a case-sensitive comparison of the Transfer-Encoding header in src/reqs.c. The is_chunked_transfer() function uses strcmp() to compare the header value against "chunked", even though RFC 7230 specifies that transfer-coding names are case-insensitive. By sending a request with Transfer-Encoding: Chunked, an unauthenticated remote a...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31842
 
🚨 CVE-2026-34977 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Aperi'Solve is an open-source steganalysis web platform. Prior to 3.2.1, when uploading a JPEG, a user can specify an optional password to accompany the JPEG. This password is then directly passed into an expect command, which is then subsequently passed into a bash -c command, without any form of sanitization or validation. An unauthenticated attacker can achieve root-level RCE inside the worker container with a sin...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34977
 
📰 VMware Cloud Foundation Edge 9.0: Two-Host Edge Site Deployment with Brownfield Import
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
In our previous blog post, we explored how VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) Edge 9.0 enables organizations to deploy single-host edge sites that support both VM and container workloads, dramatically reducing edge footprint and capital expenditure. While single-host deployments excel in space-constrained environments, many organizations require additional resilience and capacity at their edge locations.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/07/vcf-edge-brownfield-import-two-host-deployment/
 
📰 ‘GrafanaGhost’ vulnerability allowed for silent data exfiltration through AI workflows - SiliconANGLE
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Grafana no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxONC0xSW5GVlRqeHF5TGEyTzJSd1FiUG9BdXFCMmx3RDl6eTFJT0ViNkY4QWhzRU1XSk42aWJFVU9sSzFzNGJWYjVLWmNDeGl6Rm1HY200aUxaRFd6LWtRa2NLd0poQXVUamJBaWhMUXhwbEQxdHhVQWlWYnFhUVRtVDNHbnVoWFBORmJWb1Myd0JVeFdOS29PcXdPRGUtTFdaNnJ4UFpPUUItdXZ0U2ItZWZRQWxveV9U?oc=5
 
📰 GrafanaGhost: Attackers Can Abuse Grafana to Leak Enterprise Data - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Zero‑click Grafana AI attack can enable enterprise data exfiltration - csoonline.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxQVDAxRHFYRXIweS1Tbi1hajVoU2xGa2xTUWt2RmtPdlFzc2NkNWo2YXA0X1B4NFpTRDVrU0dxSGxpSTd6TjhlQnBRcWFVMG5sRWF4UldjSDVpb2kxdm0tLXhRQURHRjE5UkJkZlFnQjkxa3I3c2FmdXBGcXcwMXNoczFhbkYwWkh4YV83MWFEWE1aVS1GaFhVVV9oT3ZHeXZRZy0tUXhna2djMjczQWpJUTViVTFMYmpqelFPS0ZkRDI?oc=5
 
📰 Your Database Is About to Become an AI Tool. Is It Ready?
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A Security Primer for MCP Database IntegrationPart 1: Building the Security Foundation [A version of this article appeared in The New Stack] For 25 years, I’ve watched the database sit behind layers of protection: firewalls, VPNs, connection poolers, role-based access, and even change review boards. We built decades of tooling to make sure the wrong …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/your-database-is-about-to-become-an-ai-tool-is-it-ready/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Flowise AI Agent Builder Under Active CVSS 10.0 RCE Exploitation; 12,000+ Instances Exposed
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Threat actors are exploiting a maximum-severity security flaw in Flowise, an open-source artificial intelligence (AI) platform, according to new findings from VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2025-59528 (CVSS score: 10.0), a code injection vulnerability that could result in remote code execution. "The CustomMCP node allows users to input configuration settings for connecting
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/flowise-ai-agent-builder-under-active.html
 
💣 New GPUBreach Attack Enables Full CPU Privilege Escalation via GDDR6 Bit-Flips
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
New academic research has identified multiple RowHammer attacks against high-performance graphics processing units (GPUs) that could be exploited to escalate privileges and, in some cases, even take full control of a host. The efforts have been codenamed GPUBreach, GDDRHammer, and GeForge. GPUBreach goes a step further than GPUHammer, demonstrating for the first time that
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/new-gpubreach-attack-enables-full-cpu.html
 
💣 CISA orders feds to patch exploited Fortinet EMS flaw by Friday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) ordered federal agencies to secure FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS) instances against an actively exploited vulnerability by Friday.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-fortinet-flaw-exploited-in-attacks-by-friday/
 
💣 Disgruntled researcher leaks “BlueHammer” Windows zero-day exploit
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Exploit code has been released for an unpatched Windows privilege escalation flaw reported privately to Microsoft, allowing attackers to gain SYSTEM or elevated administrator permissions.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/disgruntled-researcher-leaks-bluehammer-windows-zero-day-exploit/
 
💣 China-Linked Storm-1175 Exploits Zero-Days to Rapidly Deploy Medusa Ransomware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A China-based threat actor known for deploying Medusa ransomware has been linked to the weaponization of a combination of zero-day and N-day vulnerabilities to orchestrate "high-velocity" attacks and break into susceptible internet-facing systems. "The threat actor's high operational tempo and proficiency in identifying exposed perimeter assets have proven successful, with recent
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/china-linked-storm-1175-exploits-zero.html
 
💣 Microsoft links Medusa ransomware affiliate to zero-day attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft says that Storm-1175, a China-based financially motivated cybercriminal group known for deploying Medusa ransomware payloads, has been deploying n-day and zero-day exploits in high-velocity attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/microsoft-links-medusa-ransomware-affiliate-to-zero-day-attacks/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-0740 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Ninja Forms - File Uploads plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due to missing file type validation in the 'NF_FU_AJAX_Controllers_Uploads::handle_upload' function in all versions up to, and including, 3.3.26. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files on the affected site's server which may make remote code execution possible. Note: The vulnerability wa...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0740
 
🚨 USN-8152-1: Linux kernel (OEM) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that some AMD Zen 5 processors supporting RDSEED instruction did not properly handle entropy, potentially resulting in the consumption of insufficiently random values. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to influence the values returned by the RDSEED instruction causing loss of confidentiality and integrity. (CVE-2025-62626) Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the Ap...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8152-1
 
🚨 USN-8153-1: Salt vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Zach Malone discovered that Salt did not properly handle permissions to cache data. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive information. (CVE-2015-8034) Dylan Frese discovered that Salt incorrectly allowed users to specify PAM service. An attacker could possibly use this issue to bypass authentication.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8153-1
 
🚨 CVE-2025-15611 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Popup Box WordPress plugin before 5.5.0 does not properly validate nonces in the add_or_edit_popupbox() function before saving popup data, allowing unauthenticated attackers to perform Cross-Site Request Forgery attacks. When an authenticated admin visits a malicious page, the attacker can create or modify popups with arbitrary JavaScript that executes in the admin panel and frontend.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15611
 
💣 North Korean hackers infiltrated DeFi teams for years ahead of Drift Protocol exploit - The Cryptonomist
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTE1GRVhTdUROUEZoeUtTRy1PQm1XRHJMRk93eWs3eVlVbmFvTk5hcUNMM0RhT3dQSFlwNHlOenZhTWpONUVPSXRHZy1LU1Q4N09pTHVxNG9ndTJiZ3ZXbUptOWt2VkxiaXhNX05KQ29LaGs2QWlGYVEzdmNKTlpXdw?oc=5
 
📰 50,000+ WordPress Sites at Risk from Critical Ninja Forms RCE Flaw - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a WordPress, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTFBpeWNSY3lNdl9rdnZ6OWdWdXBTMXV6TE80RGt4UkV1RTFBRkV0R2VGdE9rSjgyM3BSeVZCSFpWOTZOc0pWcE5QNDZTOTc5VUJpYUZEQUlyY9IBV0FVX3lxTFBpeWNSY3lNdl9rdnZ6OWdWdXBTMXV6TE80RGt4UkV1RTFBRkV0R2VGdE9rSjgyM3BSeVZCSFpWOTZOc0pWcE5QNDZTOTc5VUJpYUZEQUlyYw?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 06/04/2026 e 07/04/2026.
